name: Manuscript Lifecycle State Diagram
input: Create a state diagram showing the lifecycle of a scientific manuscript. States: Draft, Internal Review, Submitted, Under Review, Revision Requested, Revised, Accepted, In Production, Published, Rejected. Transitions: Draft -> Internal Review (submit for co-author review). Internal Review -> Draft (revisions needed) or Internal Review -> Submitted (approved). Submitted -> Under Review (editor assigns reviewers). Under Review -> Revision Requested (reviewers request changes) or Under Review -> Accepted (accepted as-is) or Under Review -> Rejected (rejected). Revision Requested -> Revised (author revises). Revised -> Under Review (re-review). Accepted -> In Production (copyediting). In Production -> Published (final). Rejected -> Draft (rewrite for another journal). Use stateDiagram-v2 syntax.
qualityCriteria: All 10 states present (Draft, Internal Review, Submitted, Under Review, Revision Requested, Revised, Accepted, In Production, Published, Rejected)
Revision cycle loop (Under Review -> Revision Requested -> Revised -> Under Review)
Terminal state Published reached from In Production
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: State diagram with 10 states, revision cycle loop, rejection path, full manuscript lifecycle.
